title: String LIKE prefix lookup - indexed
description: Compare prefix-compatible string LIKE lookup where both engines may use their name indexes: SQLite ix_records_name and Polar.DB SVectorIndex.GetAllByLike.

fairness.notes: Prefix-only experiment. SQLite creates ix_records_name and uses LIKE prefix-compatible patterns; Polar.DB creates SVectorIndex and uses GetAllByLike. Contains scan is intentionally excluded.

runs.notes: Outer runs are process-level benchmark repetitions; workload.options controls inner LIKE query sampling.
